name: SaaS Landing (Aesthetics + Multi-section)
description:
Build a COMPLETE multi-section SaaS marketing site for a fictional product **OrbitFlow** (AI project management for remote teams). Single-file or index.html + styles.css + app.js. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only; Google Fonts allowed; NO other CDNs / React / Tailwind CDN.

## Product brief
Tagline must convey: ship faster with AI-assisted planning. Primary CTA copy must match /Start free|Get started|Try free|Book demo/i.

## Required DOM contract (ids / classes)
1. Sticky header `#site-header` with brand text **OrbitFlow**, nav links `#nav-product` `#nav-pricing` `#nav-customers` `#nav-docs`, and header CTA `#header-cta`.
2. Hero `#hero` with eyebrow `#hero-eyebrow`, `h1#hero-title`, subtitle `#hero-subtitle`, primary button `#cta-primary`, secondary button `#cta-secondary` (e.g. Watch demo).
3. Logo cloud `#logo-cloud` with ≥4 `.logo-item` (can be text brands).
4. Features `#features` with grid `#features-grid` and ≥6 `.feature-card` each containing `h3` + `p` and optional icon.
5. How-it-works `#how-it-works` with ≥3 ordered steps `.step-item` each with `.step-number` and `.step-title`.
6. Social proof `#testimonials` with ≥3 `.testimonial-card` (quote + author name + role).
7. Pricing `#pricing` with toggle `#billing-toggle` switching monthly/yearly (data-billing on `#pricing` or body class `billing-yearly`), and exactly 3 `.plan-card` with `data-plan` in {starter,pro,enterprise}, each with `.plan-price` and `.plan-cta`.
8. FAQ `#faq` with ≥4 `.faq-item` (button/summary + answer panel); at least one can expand/collapse via JS or details/summary.
9. Final CTA band `#final-cta` with button `#final-cta-btn`.
10. Footer `#site-footer` with ≥3 footer link groups `.footer-col`.

## Aesthetics (anti-slop — inspired by Anthropic frontend-aesthetics cookbook)
- Commit to a distinctive palette via CSS variables (`--bg`, `--fg`, `--accent`, …). Avoid purple-on-white AI-default gradients and Inter/Roboto-only stacks.
- Use a display + body font pairing (load from Google Fonts if needed).
- Dark OR light is fine; must feel intentional. Include hover states and visible `:focus-visible`.
- Responsive: usable at ≤480px (hamburger `#menu-toggle` may collapse nav).
- Prefer CSS animations for hero entrance or staggered feature cards (respect prefers-reduced-motion).

## Acceptance
When structure + interactions (billing toggle and at least FAQ expand OR mobile menu) work, reply FINISHED.
source: Claude Cookbook: Prompting for frontend aesthetics (SaaS landing) + FrontendBench multi-section marketing pages + Anthropic frontend-design skill (anti-templated UI).
